summary: Review transcendental-magic staged edges via /guru-review-edges queue flow (no auto-promote)
description:
Run the /guru-review-edges skill flow over the new staged_edges involving transcendental-magic-doctrine/-ritual: queue accept / reclassify / reject decisions through the guru-review web app HTTP API WITHOUT applying. Per standing policy (2026-07-14) auto_promote_edges.py is never run, at any confidence tier — including the 0.85 tier it would normally sweep.

The operator retains the final apply gate: this ticket ends with a fully queued decision set and a summary of queued decisions by type and confidence. Applying is the operator's action in the web app, not part of this ticket.

Done: every transcendental-magic staged_edge has a queued decision in guru-review; counts recorded in close note; zero writes to live edges; verified tier untouched.

resolution.note: All 1,281 pending transcendental-magic staged_edges queued via guru-review API as reviewer agent-claude (verified: edge-queued.log = 1,281 lines, 1:1 with safe set; server total_queued 6,170 = 4,889 tag + 1,281 edge). Decisions: 765 accept / 65 reclassify CONTRASTS / 448 reclassify surface_only / 3 reclassify unrelated. Staged types: 1,276 PARALLELS + 5 native CONTRASTS (all 5 accepted, plotinus anti-magic axis). Zero /api/apply calls; zero live-edge writes; verified tier untouched. 18 Budge duplicate-body chunk pairs found (reported to operator, no tickets opened). Full per-batch record in session scratchpad edge-review-state.md.
